title: Scry Extension Manifest
description: Manifest for a Scry mini-app extension. One per extension folder, named extension.json.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema for editor tooling.

id.description: Globally unique id. Reverse-DNS recommended (com.you.thing). Used as the registry key.

entry.description: Relative path to the HTML file loaded in the mini-app frame. Must stay inside the extension folder.

description.description: One-line summary shown in tooltips and the launcher.

icon.description: Relative path to an icon (svg or png) used in the dock and launcher.

surfaces.description: Where the extension is mounted in the UI.

panel.description: Default panel size when the mini-app is opened from a dock.

permissions.description: Bridge capabilities the extension requests. Empty means a fully sandboxed frame with no host access.

engine.description: Render engine. Only 'iframe' is supported today; 'native' is reserved.

minScryVersion.description: Minimum Scry version required. Advisory in Phase 1.
